prompt: Create a cinematic luxury fashion editorial photo of an elegant East Asian woman in her late 20s with long wavy black hair walking confidently straight toward the camera on a dark glossy studio floor. She wears a champagne ivory silk satin button-up blouse with an open collar and rolled sleeves, high-waisted wide-leg black tailored trousers, black heels, subtle gold jewelry, and holds black sunglasses loosely in one hand. Her expression is calm, poised, and self-assured, with natural polished makeup and direct eye contact. The background is a deep emerald-black minimal studio wall with one enormous warm amber circular light behind her head and upper body, resembling a full moon or spotlight halo. Use dramatic low-key lighting, warm rim light on her hair and blouse, soft reflections on the floor, rich contrast, shallow depth of field, and a premium runway editorial mood. Compose as a full-body centered portrait in a wide 16:9 frame, with the figure vertically centered and the glowing circle perfectly aligned behind her. Ultra-realistic photography, high fashion campaign quality, sharp subject, smooth cinematic color grading, no text, no logos, no extra people.
